timelineData.title: Computer Science B.Sc.
timelineData.description: Completed a B.Sc. in Computer Science with a focus on software development, algorithms, and system design.

timelineData.title: Assembly & Operating Systems Instructor
timelineData.description: Taught x86 Assembly and OS fundamentals with an emphasis on low-level debugging, system architecture, and practical problem-solving.

timelineData.title: Software Testing Engineer
timelineData.description:
Executed hardware-software integration testing for complex multidisciplinary medical systems.
Built internal tools to automate manual validation tasks, improving team efficiency.
Translated system requirements into structured validation protocols for regulatory release.

timelineData.title: Automation Engineer
timelineData.description:
Developed C#/.NET and Ranorex automation for complex medical device software.
Reduced execution time by 70% through event-driven design and bottleneck optimization.
Expanded automation coverage from 20% to 45% and designed modular frameworks with dynamic object repositories.
Collaborated with R&D and clinical experts to validate complex edge cases.

timelineData.title: International Travel & Personal Development
timelineData.description: Dedicated time for international travel, continuous learning, and skill development.
